com.nib.supernaut.Channel

Packages that use Channel
Package
Description
com.nib.supernaut
Core implementation of the Supernaut online transaction processing (OLTP) region.
com.nib.supernaut.exceptions
Exceptions for Supernaut online errors.

    Starts a transaction identified by the specified transaction ID (transid).
